label: commit-push
command:
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: ArchitectAgent + MilestoneManager + DependencyGraph + CrashRecovery

GÖREV 1 — ArchitectAgent (src/agent/architect.ts):
  5 interaktif mimari soru: auth, database, API, frontend, deployment
  runInteractive(): CLI readline
  runWithDefaults(): test/CI injection
  writeToArchitecture(): ARCHITECTURE.md'ye Kararlar bölümü
  parseDecisions(): ARCHITECTURE.md'den parse
  Seçenekler: JWT/Session/OAuth/APIKey, PG/Mongo/SQLite/InMem,
              REST/GraphQL/tRPC, React/Vue/Next/API-only, Local/Docker/Cloud

GÖREV 2 — MilestoneManager (src/orchestrator/milestone-manager.ts):
  createMilestones(brief, arch) → MilestonePlan
  Otomatik milestone zinciri:
    M01: Foundation (config, DB schema)
    M02: Auth (eğer auth != none)
    M03: API (endpoints, tests)
    M04: Frontend (eğer frontend != api-only)
    M05: Integration (E2E)
  dependsOn ile sıralama
  getNextMilestone(): bağımlılıkları tamamlanmış ilk pending
  renderMilestoneState(): STATE.md için

GÖREV 3 — DependencyGraph (src/orchestrator/dependency-graph.ts):
  Kahn's algorithm topological sort
  getExecutionOrder(): [[T1,T2], [T3], [T4,T5]] paralel gruplar
  hasCycle(): DFS-based cycle detection
  getReadyTasks(completed): dinamik paralel gruplama
  getDependencies/getDependents: edge queries

GÖREV 5 — RecoveryManager (src/orchestrator/recovery.ts):
  .pc-checkpoint.json: sessionId, milestoneId, completed tasks/milestones
  saveCheckpoint/loadCheckpoint/canResume/clearCheckpoint
  promptResume(): kullanıcıya devam sor (test injection)
  getResumePoint(): kaldığı milestone + completed tasks

GÖREV 6 — Integration Test:
  Blog API pipeline: architect(JWT,PG,REST) → milestones(4+) → 
  dependency graph(no cycle) → milestone execution sim →
  crash recovery(save/load/resume/clear)

Types: ArchitectureDecisions, Milestone, MilestonePlan, Checkpoint,
       AuthStrategy, DatabaseChoice, ApiStyle, FrontendChoice, DeployTarget

Kararlar: D020 (architect), D021 (milestone), D022 (dep graph), D023 (recovery)
Tests: 24 new (8 dep-graph + 16 milestone-integration)
Total: 144/144 passing, 15 suites, TypeScript strict 0 error" && git.exe push origin master 2>&1
